hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Axolotl in the wild
hero.caption: The Axolotl is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Axolotl navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Axolotl finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Axolotl.

baby.alt: A young or baby Axolotl showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Axolotls must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.fileTitle: File:Detalle a larva de axolote Ambystoma mexicanum dentro del huevo.jpg
family.alt: A group of Axolotls interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Axolotls interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Axolotl traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Axolotl
size.caption: The size of a Axolotl can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Axolotl
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Axolotl's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Axolotl showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Axolotl has amazing features that help it survive?
